race.comment: LUSKINTYRE (4) peaked on the run first-up after a long layoff with a plugging fourth over 1000m at Kembla Grange. Regular rider hops back aboard in what looks a winnable race. RED CHICK (7) lived up to expectations first-up with a sharp on-pace Maiden victory over 1000m at Port Macquarie. Claim helps from the sticky gate and don't dismiss in this stronger contest. DON'T WHAT ME (3) back in class when he recorded a strong on-speed win at start seven over this trip at Nowra in the heavy going. Value contender with fitness on his side. SERINDA (5) returns from a let-up and now in the Blake Ryan yard. Struggled in the heavy going when fifth over 1200m at Pakenham in BM64 grade last April. Fitted with a trial win over 800m and expected to take a hand in the finish.
